summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Community Fund Management app. Backend API 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with excellent role-based access and core workflows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Pakistani phone validation error messaging may not be displayed clearly to users

passed_tests: Super Admin login with credentials +923142256184 and PIN 1234
Admin dashboard displays correctly with stats cards
All navigation pages load successfully (Users, Fee Submission, Fund Allocation, Approvals, Monthly Fees, Notifications)
Role-based navigation shows correct menu items for admin
Logout functionality redirects to login page
User management and promotion to admin
Fee submission form user selection and dropdowns
Fund allocation form beneficiary selection and categories
Responsive design elements and sidebar navigation
